name: Ruggalach I
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sandra Capps WXHA93A
Sift flour and blend with softened butter. Add sour cream and egg yolk.
Divide into 4 equal balls and chill at least 3 hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
For filling, mix walnuts, sugar, and cinnamon.
Roll dough into 4 circles and cut into 12 wedges each.
Roll with 1/2 teaspoon of filling at outer edge of wedge (wide end). Brush with egg white and dip in sugar mixture to coat top.
Bake at 400 degrees about 20 minutes on lightly greased sheet. Makes 4 dozen.
